title: WarpsTime!
description: Lightweight plugin for simple warps: Players can teleport using a special gui /warp.
body:
# WarpsTime! - A Simple Warps Plugin!

**WarpsTime** is a versatile and user-friendly Minecraft server plugin designed to give administrators and players full control over server warps. It offers an intuitive, graphical user interface (GUI) for managing teleportation points, making the process of creating, editing, and using warps simple and efficient.

Don’t believe it? **TRY THE LATEST BETA NOW!**

⚠️ **NOTE** Java 21 or higher is required!

### Features
- GUI-Based Management
- Intuitive Creation & Editing
- Permissions and Access Control
- Color Code Support

### Commands
- **/warps** - Opens the main warp GUI.
- **/warp** - Opens the main warp GUI.
- **/warp create <name>** - Creates a new warp.
- **/warp edit <name>** - Opens the editing GUI for an existing warp.
- **/warp delete <name>** - Permanently removes a warp.
- **/warp <warp name>** - Teleports you directly to a specific warp.

### Permissions
- warpsTime.warps
- warpsTime.create
- warpsTime.delete
- warpsTime.edit

### Easy configuration
configuration from version **1.0 BETA**
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>


```
##  __          __           _______ _
##  \ \        / /          |__   __(_)
##   \ \  /\  / /_ _ _ __ _ __ | |   _ _ __ ___   ___
##    \ \/  \/ / _` | '__| '_ \| |  | | '_ ` _ \ / _ \
##     \  /\  / (_| | |  | |_) | |  | | | | | | |  __/
##      \/  \/ \__,_|_|  | .__/|_|  |_|_| |_| |_|\___|
##                       | |
##                       |_|

messages:
  prefix: "&x&4&4&9&8&D&B&lW&x&3&D&8&D&C&D&la&x&3&6&8&3&B&F&lr&x&2&F&7&8&B&0&lp&x&2&8&6&D&A&2&ls&x&2&0&6&2&9&4&lT&x&1&9&5&8&8&6&li&x&1&2&4&D&7&7&lm&x&0&B&4&2&6&9&le "
  warp-created: "&aWarp &3%warp_name%&a has been created!"
  warp-deleted: "&cWarp &3%warp_name%&c has been deleted!"
  warp-teleported: "&aTeleported to &3%warp_name%&a."
  warp-already-exists: "&cA warp with this name already exists!"
  warp-not-found: "&cWarp &3%warp_name%&c not found."
  no-permission: "&cYou do not have permission to use this command."
  invalid-usage-create: "&cUsage: /warp create <warp_name>"
  invalid-usage-delete: "&cUsage: /warp delete <warp_name>"
  invalid-usage-edit: "&cUsage: /warp edit <warp_name>"
  gui-title-warps: "&x&4&4&9&8&D&B&lW&x&3&6&8&3&B&F&la&x&2&8&6&D&A&2&lr&x&1&9&5&8&8&6&lp&x&0&B&4&2&6&9&ls"
  gui-title-create-warp: "&x&4&4&9&8&D&B&lC&x&3&E&8&F&D&0&lr&x&3&9&8&7&C&4&le&x&3&3&7&E&B&9&la&x&2&D&7&6&A&D&lt&x&2&8&6&D&A&2&le &x&1&C&5&C&8&B&lW&x&1&6&5&3&8&0&la&x&1&1&4&B&7&4&lr&x&0&B&4&2&6&9&lp"
  gui-title-edit-warp-match: "&x&4&4&9&8&D&B&lE&x&3&D&8&D&C&D&ld&x&3&6&8&3&B&F&li&x&2&F&7&8&B&0&lt &x&2&0&6&2&9&4&lW&x&1&9&5&8&8&6&la&x&1&2&4&D&7&7&lr&x&0&B&4&2&6&9&lp"
  gui-title-edit-warp-display: "&x&4&4&9&8&D&B&lE&x&3&D&8&D&C&D&ld&x&3&6&8&3&B&F&li&x&2&F&7&8&B&0&lt &x&2&0&6&2&9&4&lW&x&1&9&5&8&8&6&la&x&1&2&4&D&7&7&lr&x&0&B&4&2&6&9&lp&8: &8%warp_name%"
  gui-title-change-location: "&x&4&4&9&8&D&B&lW&x&3&F&9&1&D&2&la&x&3&B&8&A&C&8&lr&x&3&6&8&3&B&F&lp &x&2&C&7&4&A&C&lL&x&2&8&6&D&A&2&lo&x&2&3&6&6&9&9&lc&x&1&E&5&F&8&F&la&x&1&9&5&8&8&6&lt&x&1&5&5&0&7&C&li&x&1&0&4&9&7&3&lo&x&0&B&4&2&6&9&ln&8: &8%warp_name%"
  edit-option-change-name: "&7Change &3Warp Name"
  edit-option-change-icon: "&7Change &3Warp Icon"
  edit-option-change-location: "&7Change &3Warp Location"
  edit-name-lore:
    - "&7"
    - "&7Click to change the warp's name."
    - "&7This will also change its ID."
  edit-icon-lore-current: "&7Current icon: &3%current_icon%"
  edit-icon-lore-change:
    - "&7"
    - "&7Changes the warp icon."
    - "&7Make sure you are holding"
    - "&7an item in your hand."
  edit-location-lore:
    - "&7"
    - "&7Click to change the warp's location."
    - "&7A GUI will open where you can"
    - "&7select a new slot and set your"
    - "&7current position as the new location."
  prompt-new-name: "&aPlease enter the new name for warp &3%warp_name%&a in chat."
  name-changed: "&aWarp &3%old_name%&a has been renamed to &3%new_name%&a."
  icon-changed: "&aIcon for warp &3%warp_name%&a has been changed to &e%new_icon%&a."
  location-changed: "&aLocation for warp &3%warp_name%&a has been updated to your current position and slot &e%new_slot%&a."
  empty-hand-error: "&cYou must be holding an item to change the warp icon!"
  warp-name-invalid: "&cNew warp name cannot be empty or already exist."
  slot-occupied-error: "&cThis slot is already occupied! Please choose another free spot."
  creation-error: "&cAn error occurred while creating the warp. Please try again."
  only-players-command: "&cOnly players can use this command."
  creation-gui-occupied-display: "&7Red &c(Occupied)"
  creation-gui-occupied-lore: "&cThis slot is occupied."
  creation-gui-available-display: "&7Green &a(Available)"
  creation-gui-available-lore: "&aThis slot is available."
  creation-gui-new-warp-name-lore: "&7New warp name: &3"

gui:
  available-slot-material: LIME_STAINED_GLASS_PANE
  occupied-slot-material: RED_STAINED_GLASS_PANE
  slot-fill-material: BLACK_STAINED_GLASS_PANE
  edit-name-item-material: NAME_TAG
  edit-location-item-material: COMPASS

default-warp-lore:
  - "&7This is warp lore!"
  - "&7You can change it in &3config.yml&7."
```
